subcodes.first_line: O daystar of remembrance and praise, and O mountain who art illumined with the flame of guidance! What a poignant melody was this that kindled a fire in the hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نیر افق ذکر و ثنا و ای سینا منور بشعله هدی این چه نغمه جانسوز بود که در قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
